tier1_low_maturity.description: Minimal merchant exports with sparse metadata, inconsistent formatting, and high optional-field missingness.

tier2_medium_maturity.description: Moderately enriched merchant data with payment, IP, delivery, and partial device fields.
examples: Shopify plus export plus Stripe fields

tier3_high_maturity.description: Rich fraud-tool or OMS-enriched export with device, browser, payment, delivery, claim, and behavioural metadata.
examples: Shopify plus plus fraud app export
